The passage highlights that Finland has a high incidence of sauna use, and the KIHD study shows frequent sauna use is linked to a lower risk of psychotic disorders. Since this association was observed in a population with high sauna use, it is more plausible that a higher percentage of the population would experience this benefit in Finland than elsewhere. Therefore, the most plausible outcome in Finland is decreased rates of psychotic disorders among frequent sauna users.

\boxed{F}
